requirement_topic.en: EAC Conformity Mark — Combined EAEU Conformity Assessment (TR CU 004/2011 LVD + TR CU 020/2011 EMC + EAEU energy efficiency)
requirement_topic.zh: EAC合格标志——EAEU合并合格评定（TR CU 004/2011低压 + TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容 + EAEU能效）
requirement_topic.zht: EAC合格標誌——EAEU合併合格評定（TR CU 004/2011低壓 + TR CU 020/2011電磁相容 + EAEU能效）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Kazakhstan market must bear the EAC （Eurasian Conformity） mark, demonstrating conformity with all applicable EAEU Technical Regulations. For a standard household refrigerator this means conformity with at minimum: (1) TR CU 004/2011 （safety of low-voltage equipment, assessed against GOST IEC 60335-2-24）; (2) TR CU 020/2011 （electromagnetic compatibility, assessed against the GOST CISPR 14 series）; (3) the EAEU energy-efficiency requirements and energy-efficiency label. In addition, restriction of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment is addressed by TR EAEU 037/2016 （a RoHS-style regime restricting lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, and certain flame retardants）. Conformity to TR CU 004/2011 and TR CU 020/2011 is normally demonstrated by a single combined certificate or declaration of conformity issued by an EAEU-accredited certification body, registered in the unified EAEU register; the EAC mark is then affixed to the product and packaging. Product markings, rating plate, and user documentation must be in Russian （and Kazakh where required）.
summary.zh: 投放哈萨克斯坦市场的家用制冷器具须加贴EAC（欧亚合格）标志，以证明符合所有适用的EAEU技术法规。对于标准家用电冰箱，至少须符合：（1）TR CU 004/2011（低压设备安全，依据GOST IEC 60335-2-24评定）；（2）TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容，依据GOST CISPR 14系列评定）；（3）EAEU能效要求及能效标签。此外，电气电子设备中有害物质的限制由TR EAEU 037/2016（一种RoHS式制度，限制铅、汞、镉、六价铬及某些阻燃剂）管控。符合TR CU 004/2011和TR CU 020/2011通常以由EAEU认可的认证机构出具的单一合并证书或符合性声明证明，并在EAEU统一注册系统登记；随后将EAC标志加贴于产品和包装。产品标识、铭牌和使用文件须以俄语（必要时含哈萨克语）提供。
summary.zht: 投放哈薩克市場的家用製冷器具須加貼EAC（歐亞合格）標誌，以證明符合所有適用的EAEU技術法規。對於標準家用電冰箱，至少須符合：（1）TR CU 004/2011（低壓設備安全，依據GOST IEC 60335-2-24評定）；（2）TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容，依據GOST CISPR 14系列評定）；（3）EAEU能效要求及能效標籤。此外，電氣電子設備中有害物質的限制由TR EAEU 037/2016（一種RoHS式制度，限制鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻及某些阻燃劑）管控。符合TR CU 004/2011和TR CU 020/2011通常以由EAEU認可的認證機構出具的單一合併證書或符合性聲明證明，並在EAEU統一登記系統登記；隨後將EAC標誌加貼於產品和包裝。產品標識、銘牌和使用文件須以俄語（必要時含哈薩克語）提供。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — On the safety of low-voltage equipment (assessed against GOST IEC 60335-2-24)
TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic compatibility of technical equipment (assessed against GOST CISPR 14 series)
TR EAEU 037/2016 — Restriction of the use of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic products (RoHS-style regime)
EAEU energy-efficiency requirements and energy-efficiency label (see rows frigkz-energy-001 / frigkz-energy-002)
EAC (Eurasian Conformity) mark — affixed after conformity assessment; certificate/declaration registered in the unified EAEU register

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification （CCC） covering both safety （GB 4706.13） and EMC （GB 4343.1） before sale. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies; it does not involve manufacturer self-declaration. Energy labelling （China Energy Label based on GB 12021.2） is a separate mandatory requirement administered by NDRC/SAMR. China's restriction of hazardous substances regime （China RoHS / GB/T 26572 and the management measures for electrical and electronic products） is administered separately. There is no single CE/EAC-equivalent mark in China: CCC covers safety/EMC, the China Energy Label covers energy, and these are separately issued and displayed.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构审核；不涉及制造商自我声明。能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的独立强制性要求。中国有害物质限制制度（中国RoHS／GB/T 26572及电器电子产品管理办法）单独管理。中国没有单一等同于CE/EAC的标志：CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效，两者分别颁发和展示。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構審核；不涉及製造商自我聲明。能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的獨立強制性要求。中國有害物質限制制度（中國RoHS／GB/T 26572及電器電子產品管理辦法）單獨管理。中國沒有單一等同於CE/EAC的標誌：CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效，兩者分別頒發和展示。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015
China RoHS — GB/T 26572 and management measures for restriction of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic products (administered separately)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a complete EAEU conformity package — CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute for any EAEU requirement: (1) Combined EAC certificate / declaration — covering TR CU 004/2011 （safety, GOST IEC 60335-2-24） and TR CU 020/2011 （EMC, GOST CISPR 14）, issued by an EAEU-accredited body and registered in the unified EAEU register; (2) TR EAEU 037/2016 hazardous-substances conformity — a separate declaration may be required; (3) EAEU energy-efficiency class and label （see frigkz-energy rows）; (4) EAC mark affixed to product and packaging; (5) Russian-language （and where required Kazakh-language） rating plate, markings, and user instructions; (6) an EAEU-established applicant / importer to hold the EAC document （see frigkz-market-002）. Because the 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China, no voltage re-engineering is needed, but every conformity document and mark must be obtained anew under the EAEU regime.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须建立完整的EAEU合规文件包——CCC和中国能效标识均不能替代任何EAEU要求：（1）合并EAC证书／声明——涵盖TR CU 004/2011（安全，GOST IEC 60335-2-24）和TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容，GOST CISPR 14），由EAEU认可机构出具并在EAEU统一注册系统登记；（2）TR EAEU 037/2016有害物质合格——可能须单独声明；（3）EAEU能效等级和标签（见frigkz-energy各行）；（4）在产品和包装上加贴EAC标志；（5）俄语（必要时含哈萨克语）铭牌、标识和使用说明；（6）须有EAEU境内设立的申请人／进口商持有EAC文件（见frigkz-market-002）。由于220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国一致，无需电压重新设计，但每份合格文件和标志均须在EAEU制度下重新取得。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須建立完整的EAEU合規文件包——CCC和中國能效標識均不能替代任何EAEU要求：（1）合併EAC證書／聲明——涵蓋TR CU 004/2011（安全，GOST IEC 60335-2-24）和TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容，GOST CISPR 14），由EAEU認可機構出具並在EAEU統一登記系統登記；（2）TR EAEU 037/2016有害物質合格——可能須單獨聲明；（3）EAEU能效等級和標籤（見frigkz-energy各行）；（4）在產品和包裝上加貼EAC標誌；（5）俄語（必要時含哈薩克語）銘牌、標識和使用說明；（6）須有EAEU境內設立的申請人／進口商持有EAC文件（見frigkz-market-002）。由於220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國一致，無需電壓重新設計，但每份合格文件和標誌均須在EAEU制度下重新取得。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — the EAC mark (covering TR CU 004/2011 safety, TR CU 020/2011 EMC, plus EAEU energy-efficiency and TR EAEU 037/2016) is required before placing household refrigerators on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EAEU) — Technical Regulations / EAC conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The EAC mark (covering TR CU 004/2011 safety, TR CU 020/2011 EMC, EAEU energy efficiency, and TR EAEU 037/2016 hazardous substances) is mandatory for Kazakhstan / EAEU market access for household refrigerators. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label are entirely separate systems — neither substitutes for the EAC certificate/declaration, the EAEU energy-efficiency label, or the Russian-language documentation. The 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China, so no voltage re-engineering is needed, but all EAEU conformity must be obtained anew.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EAC标志（涵盖TR CU 004/2011安全、TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容、EAEU能效及TR EAEU 037/2016有害物质）是家用电冰箱进入哈萨克斯坦／EAEU市场的强制要求。中国CCC和中国能效标识是完全独立的制度——均不能替代EAC证书／声明、EAEU能效标签或俄语文件。220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国一致，无需电压重新设计，但所有EAEU合格须重新取得。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EAC標誌（涵蓋TR CU 004/2011安全、TR CU 020/2011電磁相容、EAEU能效及TR EAEU 037/2016有害物質）是家用電冰箱進入哈薩克／EAEU市場的強制要求。中國CCC和中國能效標識是完全獨立的制度——均不能替代EAC證書／聲明、EAEU能效標籤或俄語文件。220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國一致，無需電壓重新設計，但所有EAEU合格須重新取得。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer / EAEU-Established Applicant — Holder of the EAC Conformity Document
requirement_topic.zh: 境内进口商／EAEU境内设立的申请人——EAC合格文件持有人
requirement_topic.zht: 境內進口商／EAEU境內設立的申請人——EAC合格文件持有人

summary.en: Under the EAEU conformity-assessment system, the EAC certificate or declaration of conformity for an imported product must be applied for and held by an applicant established in the Eurasian Economic Union — typically the in-country （Kazakhstan or other EAEU member state） importer, or a legal entity / sole entrepreneur registered in the Union that is authorised by the foreign manufacturer to act as its representative. A manufacturer established outside the EAEU （including in China） cannot itself hold a declaration of conformity; it must act through an EAEU-registered importer or authorised representative. This applicant: signs the declaration or holds the certificate; ensures the product, packaging, and documentation carry the EAC mark and Russian-language information; keeps the technical file available; and is the responsible economic operator for the appliance on the EAEU market. The in-country importer also handles customs clearance into Kazakhstan, which is landlocked and served by rail and road routes.
summary.zh: 在EAEU合格评定体系下，进口产品的EAC证书或符合性声明须由在欧亚经济联盟境内设立的申请人申请并持有——通常为境内（哈萨克斯坦或其他EAEU成员国）进口商，或在联盟境内注册、经外国制造商授权代为行事的法人／个体经营者。在EAEU境外（包括中国）设立的制造商不能自行持有符合性声明；须通过EAEU注册的进口商或授权代表行事。该申请人：签署声明或持有证书；确保产品、包装和文件带有EAC标志及俄语信息；保存可供查阅的技术文件；并作为该器具在EAEU市场的责任经济运营商。境内进口商还负责进入哈萨克斯坦的清关，哈萨克斯坦为内陆国，由铁路和公路线路服务。
summary.zht: 在EAEU合格評定體系下，進口產品的EAC證書或符合性聲明須由在歐亞經濟聯盟境內設立的申請人申請並持有——通常為境內（哈薩克或其他EAEU成員國）進口商，或在聯盟境內註冊、經外國製造商授權代為行事的法人／個體經營者。在EAEU境外（包括中國）設立的製造商不能自行持有符合性聲明；須通過EAEU註冊的進口商或授權代表行事。該申請人：簽署聲明或持有證書；確保產品、包裝和文件帶有EAC標誌及俄語資訊；保存可供查閱的技術文件；並作為該器具在EAEU市場的責任經濟運營商。境內進口商還負責進入哈薩克的清關，哈薩克為內陸國，由鐵路和公路線路服務。

standards_or_laws: EAEU conformity-assessment rules — applicant for certification / declaration must be a person established in the EAEU (importer or authorised representative)
TR CU 004/2011 and TR CU 020/2011 — conformity documents held by the EAEU-established applicant and registered in the unified EAEU register
EAEU customs clearance into Kazakhstan (landlocked; rail and road routes) handled by the in-country importer

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring an export manufacturer to act through a foreign-country resident legal applicant that holds the conformity document and serves as responsible economic operator abroad. Under the CCC domestic regime, the certification holder is the responsible party for the Chinese domestic market only; that role does not extend to or satisfy EAEU requirements. Chinese export manufacturers typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis, without a statutory obligation equivalent to the EAEU-established applicant / importer requirement.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口制造商通过持有合格文件并在境外充当责任经济运营商的目的国境内法定申请人行事。在CCC国内制度下，认证持有人仅为中国国内市场的责任方；该角色不延伸至或满足EAEU要求。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司，但不存在等同于EAEU境内设立申请人／进口商要求的法定义务。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口製造商通過持有合格文件並在境外充當責任經濟運營商的目的國境內法定申請人行事。在CCC國內制度下，認證持有人僅為中國國內市場的責任方；該角色不延伸至或滿足EAEU要求。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司，但不存在等同於EAEU境內設立申請人／進口商要求的法定義務。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for the EAEU-established applicant / importer obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer cannot itself obtain or hold the EAC certificate or declaration: (1) it must appoint or contract an EAEU-established importer or authorised representative （registered in Kazakhstan or another EAEU member state） to be the applicant for and holder of the conformity document; (2) the applicant's identity must be reflected in the conformity document, on the product/packaging, and in the user documentation; (3) without an EAEU-established applicant the EAC document cannot be registered and the product cannot legally be placed on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market, regardless of test results; (4) the importer manages customs clearance into landlocked Kazakhstan via rail/road. Manufacturers should secure this relationship early, as it gates the entire conformity assessment.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。中国电冰箱制造商不能自行取得或持有EAC证书或声明：（1）须委任或签约一家EAEU境内设立的进口商或授权代表（在哈萨克斯坦或其他EAEU成员国注册）作为合格文件的申请人和持有人；（2）申请人身份须反映在合格文件、产品／包装及使用文件中；（3）无EAEU境内设立的申请人，EAC文件无法登记，无论检测结果如何，产品均不能在哈萨克斯坦／EAEU市场合法投放；（4）进口商通过铁路／公路管理进入内陆国哈萨克斯坦的清关。制造商应尽早确立此关系，因为它制约整个合格评定。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。中國電冰箱製造商不能自行取得或持有EAC證書或聲明：（1）須委任或簽約一家EAEU境內設立的進口商或授權代表（在哈薩克或其他EAEU成員國註冊）作為合格文件的申請人和持有人；（2）申請人身份須反映在合格文件、產品／包裝及使用文件中；（3）無EAEU境內設立的申請人，EAC文件無法登記，無論檢測結果如何，產品均不能在哈薩克／EAEU市場合法投放；（4）進口商通過鐵路／公路管理進入內陸國哈薩克的清關。製造商應盡早確立此關係，因為它制約整個合格評定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — an EAEU-established applicant (in-country importer or authorised representative) is required to hold the EAC conformity document before placing the appliance on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation under Chinese law to appoint an EAEU-established applicant/importer

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EAEU) — conformity assessment / applicant rules

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer must act through an EAEU-established importer or authorised representative who applies for and holds the EAC conformity document and serves as the responsible economic operator. Without this in-country applicant the EAC document cannot be registered and the product cannot legally be placed on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market. The importer also handles customs clearance into landlocked Kazakhstan by rail/road — secure this relationship early.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电冰箱制造商须通过EAEU境内设立的进口商或授权代表行事，由其申请并持有EAC合格文件并充当责任经济运营商。无此境内申请人，EAC文件无法登记，产品不能在哈萨克斯坦／EAEU市场合法投放。进口商还负责通过铁路／公路进入内陆国哈萨克斯坦的清关——应尽早确立此关系。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電冰箱製造商須通過EAEU境內設立的進口商或授權代表行事，由其申請並持有EAC合格文件並充當責任經濟運營商。無此境內申請人，EAC文件無法登記，產品不能在哈薩克／EAEU市場合法投放。進口商還負責通過鐵路／公路進入內陸國哈薩克的清關——應盡早確立此關係。
